title: Armory Conglomery
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d8af8ae3dd35d0642d6ec9d6d2e5bb4b297c189.png)
# Attention:
To use this pack, Entity Model Features is REQUIRED.
Download Entity Model Features for Forge/Fabric [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
# About:
Armory Conglomery is an EMF-exclusive texture pack that completely revamps all armor into new, more realistic armor. Armory Conglomery accomplishes this with Entity Model Feature's exclusive feature of editing the armor model. Because of this, this pack will not work on Optifine.
# Disclaimer:
Some mods have mod compatibility, but not all of them do. If you'd like to participate in the project and make mod compatibility to go in the pack, reach out to me in my Discord server! Here is a list of every mod with built-in compatibility:
- Better End
- Dragon Loot
- The Aether (Zamenia)
- Supplementaries (Zamenia)
- Deeper & Darker (Zamenia)
- Friends & Foes (Zamenia)
- Bedrock Plus (Zamenia)
- Nether Depths (Zamenia)
- Pure Copper, Quartz, Emerald Tools (Zamenia)
- Mythic Metals (Swordial)
- Bronze (D2minic)
- Just Rose Gold (D2minic)
- Advanced Netherite (ProHenry)

## Big thank you to the following for making Mod Compat!
-Zamenia

-Swordial

-D2minic

-ProHenry
